description: Install project dependencies and verify the baseline project builds and lints successfully.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-musicsearch to restore all dependencies.
Run npm run build to verify the project compiles without errors.
Run npm run lint to verify no lint errors exist.
Check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for any relevant Next.js 16 documentation about client components and App Router patterns that may affect the favorites feature implementation.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds with exit code 0
npm run lint succeeds with exit code 0
findings: Node.js v22.23.1 installed via mise (with MISE_NODE_VERIFY=false due to gpg-agent not available). npm 10.9.8. Next.js 16.2.4 with Turbopack. Build and lint pass cleanly. Key patterns from Next.js 16 docs: Client components require 'use client' directive, localStorage/browser APIs require client components. Params in dynamic routes are Promise-based (await params). The LikeButton pattern in docs shows the exact pattern needed for favorites: Server Component page passes data to a Client Component that handles interactivity.
